metadata.title: Radar Chart Animation Generator
metadata.description: A Remotion-based tool for generating radar chart animation videos

files.empty: No assets yet. Click the upload button to add.
files.pasteHint: Hover here and press Ctrl+V (⌘V) to paste an image
files.pasteHintFull: You can paste an image with Ctrl+V (⌘V on Mac) to upload it

description.record: The output has been cleaned. Delete this task record?
description.withOutput: Delete this task and its render output? The output will be permanently removed.

tabTitles.persistence: Save the current config to the server, or load and manage saved configs
tabTitles.global: Manage the page list and override global parameters shared across pages (background, fonts, etc.)
tabTitles.comparison: Configure the comparison transition animation between two adjacent pages (switch / overlay layout)
tabTitles.values: Batch-edit each page's attribute names and scores in a table
tabTitles.pages: Adjust per-page animation timing, effects, and element layout parameters
tabTitles.assets: Manage uploaded images, videos, music, and other asset files
tabTitles.export: Create a video render task and view render queue progress

values.title: Radar values table
values.syncHeaderTip: Copy each attribute's short and full labels from page 1 (first row) to the corresponding columns on all other pages, so every page shares the same header; page values are unaffected.
values.wheelTip: Focus then scroll to adjust: Shift=±10, Alt=±0.5
values.hint: Value range 0–200. Click the leading number of a row to set that page as preview. Editing the first row's attribute names overwrites the matching names on all pages. Use the ◀ ▶ buttons in the header to swap two columns (applies to all pages).

attributes.title: Attribute editor
attributes.thresholdHint: Attributes above the threshold ({threshold}) trigger effects

password.heading: Password
password.label: Set / change password
password.hint: Once set, you can sign in with a password

oauth.heading: OAuth account linking
oauth.description: Linked OAuth accounts can be used to sign in

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to use the Radar Chart Animation Generator

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitleEmail: Enter your email to receive a verification code
register.oauthHint: Or sign in quickly with GitHub / Google

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitleEmail: Enter your registered email to receive a verification code
forgotPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
forgotPassword.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

welcome.title: Welcome aboard!
welcome.subtitle: Complete your account details to get started
welcome.passwordPlaceholderOptional: Set a password to enable password sign-in (can skip)
welcome.passwordHintOptional: You have linked a third-party login; a password is an alternative sign-in method
welcome.passwordHintRequired: Email-registered users must set a password for future sign-in
welcome.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

verify.codeSent: A verification code has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox or spam folder
